news.headline: US Congress narrowly rejects war powers resolution to halt Trump’s Iran attacks
news.summary: The US House of Representatives narrowly rejected a war powers resolution on Thursday seeking to halt President Donald Trump’s military strikes on Iran, in a 219–212 vote. news.headline: Lean harder into Hong Kong-mainland China market ties, ‘two sessions’ delegates urge
news.summary:
Hong Kong can reinforce its role as an international financial centre by deepening integration with mainland capital markets and expanding cross-border investment channels, financial industry leaders said on Thursday during China’s annual “two sessions”.

news.headline: Israel Pushes Farther Into Lebanon, and Readies for More
news.summary: Days into its offensive against Hezbollah, Israel is massing armored vehicles near the Lebanese border for a potentially much larger ground incursion.

news.headline: Suspected Iranian missile debris ignites fires in central Israel
news.summary: Debris from an intercepted Iranian missile has landed near Petach Tikva in central Israel.
